title: Backrooms Flashlight
description: This mod adds a working flashlight using the Veil API
body:
### **THIS MOD REQUIRES VEIL API SEPERATELY**
**Also make sure you don't have any mods that will conflict with Veil API.**

This mod adds a simple flashlight system using the Veil API.
Flashlight is brighter in-game.
There is really nothing to say about the mod, but that this mod was a pain to make.
